title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su shares five foundational practices for using Claude Cowork effectively, covering file structure, memory management, and workspace organization. The guidance is based on three months of running a business on the platform and emphasizes avoiding common mistakes in initial setup.
